overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a misty alien canyon with vibrant turquoise water pools and ancient stone ruins. The character traverses rocky terrain, wades through shallow crystalline water, and approaches a massive temple entrance carved into a cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon plateau with scattered turquoise pools

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across cracked rocky terrain toward the turquoise pools ahead

entered.detail: tall grey rock cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation on the right side
vibrant cyan water pool surrounded by pale rock formations
large dark wreckage of a starship visible in the misty distance
clusters of purple crystalline plants growing from rock crevices

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a misty rocky plateau surrounded by canyon walls, with vibrant turquoise pools scattered across the pale stone ground. A crashed starship looms in the foggy distance as the character begins walking forward across the cracked terrain.

events.description: character steps from dry rocky ground into shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep crystalline turquoise water in the canyon floor

entered.detail: clear shallow water covering the canyon floor with visible rocky bottom

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow turquoise water filling the canyon floor, wading through the crystalline pools as the canyon walls close in on both sides. The crashed ship appears closer on the left while alien vegetation lines the right bank.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple entrance with monumental carved stairs

events.description: massive ancient stone temple structure emerges from the mist ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the imposing temple entrance while wading through the shallow water

entered.detail: massive stone facade carved into the cliff with ornate architectural details
wide monumental staircase leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the water, a massive ancient temple structure looms ahead, carved directly into the cliff face. Wide stone stairs ascend to a dark entrance on the right, while the canyon opens slightly to reveal the monumental scale of the ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty, open plateau into the depths of a narrow canyon that culminates at a monumental ancient ruin. It begins on a rocky plateau surrounded by canyon walls, where the character walks across cracked stone past vibrant turquoise pools toward a crashed starship looming in the fog. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts as they enter the shallow, crystalline waters of the canyon floor, with the walls closing in on both sides while alien vegetation appears along the right bank. The scene then expands as the character continues wading through the water, revealing a massive temple structure carved directly into the cliff face. Finally, the camera approaches the ruins to reveal wide stone stairs ascending toward a dark entrance on the right.
